summary: Phase 2 Notice Banner & Promotion Popup feature testing complete. 9/9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin Settings 'Banners & Popups' tab with full configuration UI, NoticeBanner component shows on configured pages (dashboard, trade_monitor) with correct colors, PromotionPopup shows with 'announcement' preset style. All features working as expected.

issues: OnboardingTour modal can overlay PromotionPopup - may block dismiss button interaction for new users

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/settings/notice-banner - public endpoint, no auth required, returns banner config with enabled, text, bg_color, text_color, link_text, link_url, pages
GET /api/settings/promotion-popup - public endpoint, no auth required, returns popup config with enabled, preset, title, body, image_url, cta_text, cta_url, frequency
PUT /api/settings/platform - admin auth required, saves notice_banner_* and promo_popup_* fields correctly
NoticeBanner component (src/components/NoticeBanner.jsx) - uses sessionStorage 'notice_banner_dismissed' for dismiss state, correctly filters by page from routeToPageKey mapping
PromotionPopup component (src/components/PromotionPopup.jsx) - uses sessionStorage 'promo_popup_dismissed' and localStorage 'promo_popup_day_dismissed' for frequency control
AdminSettingsPage Banners tab - accessible via data-testid='tab-banners', has full config UI for both banner and popup
Preset styles work: announcement (blue), promo (amber), feature_update (emerald)
seed_data_creation: Notice banner enabled with text 'Trading hours updated to 3:00 PM starting Feb 20', purple background (#7C3AED), shown on dashboard and trade_monitor. Promo popup enabled with 'announcement' preset, title 'New Feature: Signal Blocking'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features (Notice Banner + Promotion Popup) are fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/settings/notice-banner (no auth), GET /api/settings/promotion-popup (no auth), PUT /api/settings/platform (admin auth). Frontend: NoticeBanner in DashboardLayout.jsx, PromotionPopup in DashboardLayout.jsx, Banners & Popups tab in AdminSettingsPage.jsx. SessionStorage keys: 'notice_banner_dismissed', 'promo_popup_dismissed'. localStorage key: 'promo_popup_day_dismissed'. To re-test popups/banners, clear these storage keys.

verified_features.details: Returns banner config without auth. Returns {enabled: true, text, bg_color, text_color, link_text, link_url, pages} when enabled.
Returns popup config without auth. Returns {enabled: true, preset, title, body, image_url, cta_text, cta_url, frequency} when enabled.
Admin can update notice_banner_* and promo_popup_* fields. Changes reflected immediately in public endpoints.

Tab found via data-testid='tab-banners'. Shows Notice Banner config (toggle, text, colors, link, page checkboxes, preview) and Promotion Popup config (toggle, preset selector, title, body, image, CTA, frequency).
Banner shows on dashboard and trade_monitor (configured pages). Does NOT show on profit-tracker (not configured). Dismiss button works (sets sessionStorage).
Purple background (#7C3AED / rgb(124,58,237)) with white text. Link 'Details' visible.
Shows on dashboard with 'announcement' preset (blue accent). Title 'New Feature: Signal Blocking' displayed. Close button and dismiss link present.
Login with admin credentials works. Returns access_token and redirects to dashboard.
